evidence.quote: To re-use the existing resolution lowering code (pdb2vol) in Situs, the cryo-EM density format was first converted with the vol2pdb tool... Each density voxel was then convoluted with a Gaussian filter using a modified version of pdb2vol
Hybrid density maps of Rh=5, 6, 8, 10, and 12 Å resolution were created for each case in this fashion.
the approach also incorporates any quality variation within the parent high-resolution cryo-EM map into the hybrid map, resulting in a more realistic low-resolution density model.

evidence.quote: We utilised such cloud services for 11 of the 13 cases... Specifically, models were obtained from a Google Colab Notebook 'AlphaFold with a density map'
For the 13 cases tested, the accuracy of models obtained from AlphaFold2 is quite good, since 11 of them show higher than 0.7 TM-score
The selected model represents the one with the best confidence based on the average predicted local distance difference test (pLDDT)

issues.reason: Text states 'Only one iteration of refinement was performed' in the context of Phenix refinement (Methods section), not as a parameter of AlphaFold2 prediction itself.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Move 'refinement_iterations' parameter to the Phenix refinement steps (Step 5 or 6) to accurately reflect the tool responsible for refinement.
